name: Mark Gross
abstract: Mark Gross (born February 20, 1966)  is an American jazz alto saxophonist of the hard bop tradition. He studied at the Berklee College of Music, graduating in 1988, then worked in the band of Lionel Hampton and performed in Five Guys Named Moe on Broadway.

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: On the live show it’ll be Winard Harper and Jason [Marsalis] alternating – my little brother – Dezron Douglas on bass, Mark Gross on saxophone.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
